title: Find Your Dream Fresno Hair Stylist at Studio One
meta_title: Studio One Hair Design: Fresno hair stylist
meta_description: Discover talented Fresno hair stylists at Studio One Hair Design. Meet our team of extension specialists and texture experts ready to transform your hair.
author: Cat Barco (Owner)
body_text:
Finding the right hair stylist can feel challenging. At Studio One Hair Design in Fresno, California, a team of talented stylists understands your hair goals and possesses the skills to achieve them.

Cat Barco is the owner with nearly three decades of experience. She specializes in natural-looking beaded row extensions and dimensional color. As a mother of three, Barco connects with clients on deeper levels, providing low-maintenance solutions that enhance confidence without requiring extensive salon time.

Barco emphasizes that trust forms the foundation of her work. She provides honest advice paired with skill to deliver results exceeding expectations. Her approach treats extensions as seamless enhancements rather than add-ons.

Hope Sanchez brings over a decade of industry experience specializing in hair texture and hair replacement services, including cuts, colors, and perms. Outside the salon, she balances family life with personal interests in reading and entertainment.

Makayla Davila is a co-stylist developing expertise in extensions and color work. She stays active through pickleball and enjoys creative pursuits like sewing and traveling.

Carina Lopez, raised in Madera, graduated from Paul Mitchell beauty school and refined skills through assisting the studio owner. She specializes in color, cuts, and extensions while maintaining dedication to personal wellness.

Amber Kehoe brings over 20 years of experience with Vidal Sassoon training foundation. Recently relocating to Fresno, she creates styles matching clients' personalities and lifestyles.

Studio One is located at 2950 E Nees Ave., #103, Fresno, CA 93720. Hours are Monday through Thursday 10 am–8 pm, Friday 10 am–7 pm, and Saturday 10 am–6 pm. The studio is closed Sundays. Appointments can be booked through their website.
